title: Unlock Piano Playing Secrets

goal: Encourage viewers to download the free cheat sheet
hook: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order.

scenes.headline: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order.
scenes.voiceover: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order.

assets.description: Musician looking frustrated while reading sheet music at a piano, head in hands, visibly distressed.

lines: It doesn't have to be this way.
scenes.headline: You’re not alone.
scenes.voiceover: Are you tired of struggling with sheet music? It doesn't have to be this way.

scenes.headline: Learn to play by ear
scenes.body: You can learn to play the songs you love by ear, without endless lessons.
scenes.voiceover: You can learn to play the songs you love by ear, without endless lessons.

scenes.voiceover: Imagine sitting down at the piano and playing your favorite tunes confidently.

assets.description: Black musician smiling and playing confidently at a piano in a church, with friends enjoying the music around.

scenes.headline: Start your journey today

voiceover_script: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order. Are you tired of struggling with sheet music? It doesn't have to be this way. You can learn to play the songs you love by ear, without endless lessons. Imagine sitting down at the piano and playing your favorite tunes confidently. That's possible! Get the free 4-chord cheat sheet and start your journey today.
